    Method
    Description
    LogEntry
    LogEntry.withPhase(TransactionStatus decision)
    Returns a copy of this entry with the phase updated to reflect a decision.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<LogEntry>
    InMemoryTransactionLog.findAllWithPhase(TransactionStatus phase)
    Returns all log entries whose phase matches the given status.
    Optional<LogEntry>
    InMemoryTransactionLog.read(UUID transactionId)
    Retrieves the last known log entry for a transaction.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    InMemoryTransactionLog.write(LogEntry entry)
    Writes or overwrites the log entry for the given transaction.
